title: keyserlingia hortensis
intro: Keyserlingia hortensis, also known as mountain carrot or hortensia, is a perennial plant belonging to the Apiaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of China, Japan, and Korea. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain sesquiterpenoid compounds and essential oils. The health benefits of Keyserlingia hortensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, with the roots used to create a decoction for medicinal purposes.
